chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5837 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.24271/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 10.02.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Learned counsel states that the petitioner shall contest the impugned notices before the issuing authority, however, the respondent department may be directed to adjudicate the same vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that pending such adjudication, no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned AAG articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
